ID: US-OLV-020
Title: Group account cards by tier
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want portfolio cards grouped by account tier/status
So that I can scan strategic accounts quickly

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] PortfolioView groups account records into visible sections.
- [ ] Each card shows key account metadata from accounts/background/actions/projects.
- [ ] Cards remain navigable when inline editable fields are focused.

Notes: Specific tier labels depend on current Supabase data.
